name: German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the white part and some green of the green onions, chopped.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil over medium heat. Cook the potatoes in their skins until tender, about 25 to 30 minutes. Drain and dry them slightly over low heat in the same pan.
3. While still warm, peel the potatoes and cut into 1/4-inch thick slices. Set aside and keep warm.
4. In a saucepan, combine green onions, chicken broth, olive oil, wine vinegar, mustard, celery seeds, and salt and pepper to taste. Simmer for 2 minutes.
5. Cool slightly. Stir in the sour cream (or yogurt) until well combined.
6. Pour the dressing over the warm potatoes and mix gently.
7. Sprinkle dill on top of the salad and serve at room temperature.
